content:
hi all! some of u may have seen me on reddit lately but i had the idea to build something for actually generating you full teams based on the characters, posses, covenants, and wheels you have! it is fully customizable with enlightens, skill card levels, covenant completion and substats, etc. i'm still working on it and would love some feedback! thank you in advance :)

try it here: https://morimens-team-builder.vercel.app

embeds.title: Morimens Team Builder
embeds.description: Build optimized, fully-geared Morimens teams from the characters you own. An unofficial fan tool with deterministic team generation plus wheel, covenant, and posse recommendations.

content:
Really nice guide, thanks for the work.
Regarding Ultra, it almost seems like a crime not to put in Spooky's team (Clementine, Arachne, Horla, Saya).
The ultra round burst can get silly, but even outside of this an invested Clem hits like an absolute truck, especially with Corrosion. Arachne also clears the board early in the run when you are staring at trash mobs, assuming you draw the right cards of course.
Guide Link: https://www.reddit.com/r/morimenstactics/comments/1u1l2vf/clementine_indepth_guide_and_build_by_spooky/
Fiddled a bit with it today, and it seems to be working! Thank you 🙂 I just couldn't move wheels around easily, but moving awakeners works really well
Yeah you're right, somehow cross team wheel moving isnt working, I'll fiddle around with it some more eventually <:thais_bow:1333988424105070644>
